# Support Guide

We want to ensure you have a great experience using FluxMedia. Below are the best channels to find help, ask questions, or report problems.

## 1. Documentation
Before asking for help, please review the official guides inside the `docs/` folder:
- **[Installation Guide](docs/installation.md)**
- **[Configuration Guide](docs/configuration.md)**
- **[Troubleshooting Guide](docs/troubleshooting.md)**
- **[FAQ](docs/faq.md)**

---

## 2. GitHub Issues
- **Bug Reports**: If you've found a bug or crash, please search existing issues to see if it has already been reported. If not, open a new issue using our **Bug Report Template**.
- **Feature Requests**: Have an idea for a new feature? We'd love to hear it! Open an issue using the **Feature Request Template**.

---

## 3. Discussion Forums & Communities
For general questions, configuration help, or show-casing setups:
- Visit **[GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/pdev-labs/FluxMedia-py/discussions)** (if enabled).
- Submit bugs and feedback directly to the developer group at **[GitHub Issue Tracker](https://github.com/pdev-labs/FluxMedia-py/issues)**.
